sections.paragraph:
adjective

bare, exposed, unconcealed, aboveboard, open, manifest, undisguised, visible, patent, overt, nonsecret, nonconfidential; frank, sincere, straightforward

masculine noun גלוי (>>גילוי)

discovery, exposing, revelation, detection, exposal, exposure, revealment, show, strike; manifestation, disclosure, divulgence, divulge, divulgement
